members.member: This attribute is used to decorate controllers and actions that do not require authorization. It skips authorization if the action is decorated with [AllowAnonymous] attribute.

This attribute is used to decorate controllers and actions that require authorization. It checks if the user is logged in by checking if HttpContext.User is set. If a user is not signed in, then it returns a 401-status code.

member.name: M:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Iam.Infrastructure.Pipeline.Middleware.Attributes.AuthorizeAttribute.OnAuthorization(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.AuthorizationFilterContext)
member.summary: This method is called when authorization is required. It checks if the user is logged in by checking if HttpContext.User is set. If a user is not signed in then it returns 401-status code.

members.member: RequestAuthorizationMiddleware is a custom middleware. This middleware is used to authorize requests. It validates a token is included in the request header and that the token is valid. If the token is valid then it sets the user in HttpContext.Items["User"].

RequestAuthorizationMiddleware is a custom middleware. This middleware is used to authorize requests. It validates a token is included in the request header and that the token is valid. If the token is valid then it sets the user in HttpContext.Items["User"].

InvokeAsync is called by the ASP.NET Core runtime. It is used to authorize requests. It validates a token is included in the request header and that the token is valid. If the token is valid then it sets the user in HttpContext.Items["User"].
RequestAuthorizationMiddlewareExtensions This class includes a method extension to register RequestAuthorizationMiddleware in the ASP.NET Core pipeline.
UseRequestAuthorization extension method is used to register RequestAuthorizationMiddleware in the ASP.NET Core pipeline.

member.name: T:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Iam.Infrastructure.Tokens.Jwt.Configuration.TokenSettings
member.summary: This class is used to store the token settings. It is used to configure the token settings in the app settings .json file.

member.param: The sign-in resource containing username and password.
member.returns: The authenticated user resource, including a JWT token

member.summary: Sign up endpoint. It allows creating a new user
member.param: The sign-up resource containing username and password.
member.returns: A confirmation message on successful creation.

member.summary: Assembler responsible for transforming a aggregate and a JWT token into an .

member.summary: Converts a aggregate and a JWT token to an .
member.param: The aggregate representing the authenticated user. Must not be null.
The JWT token generated for the authenticated user. Must not be null or empty.
member.exception: Thrown if is null or is null.

member.typeparam: The type of the result value.

member.summary: Non-generic Result class for Command Handlers.

member.name: T:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Domain.Model.Entities.IAuditableEntity
member.summary: Marks an entity as carrying audit timestamps managed by the persistence layer.
member.remarks: Any entity in any bounded context that implements this interface will automatically have set once on first persistence and refreshed on every subsequent save, via AuditableEntityInterceptor.

member.name: P:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Domain.Model.Entities.IAuditableEntity.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the entity was first persisted.

member.name: P:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Domain.Model.Entities.IAuditableEntity.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the entity was last saved.

member.name: T:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Domain.Model.Error

member.summary: Represents a domain error.

member.name: P:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Domain.Model.Error.Code
member.summary: The unique error code.

member.name: P:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Domain.Model.Error.Message
member.summary: The error message.

member.name: T:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Domain.Model.Events.IEvent
member.summary: Represents a domain event in the system.
member.remarks: This interface is used to mark classes as domain events that can be published and handled by the event bus. It extends from to integrate with the mediator pattern for event handling.

member.typeparam: The entity type for the repository

member.summary: Find an entity by its id
member.param: The id of the entity to find
member.returns: The entity if found, otherwise null

member.name: M:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Domain.Repositories.IBaseRepository`1.Remove(`0)
member.summary: Remove an entity from the repository

member.summary: List all entities in the repository

member.name: T:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Infrastructure.Interfaces.AspNetCore.Configuration.Extensions.StringExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for .

member.name: M:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Infrastructure.Interfaces.AspNetCore.Configuration.Extensions.StringExtensions.ToKebabCase(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the text to kebab case.

member.name: M:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Infrastructure.Interfaces.AspNetCore.Configuration.Extensions.StringExtensions.KebabCaseRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?<!^)([A-Z][a-z]|(?<=[a-z])[A-Z])
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Zero-width negative lookbehind.
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [A-Z].
○ Match a character in the set [a-z].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Zero-width positive lookbehind.
○ Match a character in the set [a-z] right-to-left.
○ Match a character in the set [A-Z].

member.name: T:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Infrastructure.Interfaces.AspNetCore.Configuration.KebabCaseRouteNamingConvention
member.summary: This class is used to replace the default route naming convention with a kebab-case naming convention.

member.name: M:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Infrastructure.Interfaces.AspNetCore.Configuration.KebabCaseRouteNamingConvention.Apply(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ApplicationModels.ControllerModel)
member.summary: This method applies the kebab-case naming convention to the controller.

member.summary: This method replaces the default controller template with a kebab-case template.

member.param: The model builder for the database context

member.summary: Model builder extensions for the database context

member.param: The model builder for the database context

member.summary: String extensions for the database context

member.summary: Convert the string to snake case
member.param: The text to convert to snake case

member.name: M:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Infrastructure.Persistence.EntityFrameworkCore.Configuration.Extensions.StringExtensions.ToPlural(System.String)
member.summary: Convert the string to plural
member.param: The text to convert to plural

member.name: T:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Infrastructure.Persistence.EntityFrameworkCore.Interceptors.AuditableEntityInterceptor
member.summary: EF Core interceptor that automatically populates audit timestamps on any entity that implements .
member.remarks:
CreatedDate — set once when the entity is first added.
UpdatedDate — refreshed on every addition or update.
Register this interceptor in AppDbContext.OnConfiguring so it applies to all bounded contexts sharing the same .

member.name: T:SyncedHealth.Center.Platform.Shared.Infrastructure.Persistence.EntityFrameworkCore.Repositories.BaseRepository`1
member.summary: Base repository for all repositories
member.remarks: This class is used to define the basic CRUD operations for all repositories. This class implements the IBaseRepository interface.
member.typeparam: The entity type for the repository

member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.
